_comment: MANUAL-WIRING ALTERNATIVE. The primary artifact is plugins/engram/hooks/hooks.json, which Claude Code auto-registers when the Engram plugin is installed. Use this snippet only if you wire hooks by hand: merge the 'hooks' object below into your .claude/settings.json. ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} resolves to the plugin install dir; if you installed the scripts outside a plugin, replace it with ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/engram or an absolute path. Requires python3 on PATH (some Windows installs use 'python').
